name: Golden Egg Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in the order listed, select white bread and press "Start".
2. Unless otherwise noted, ensure all ingredients are at room temperature.
3. If mixing by hand, knead after second cycle until dough is smooth.
4. Remove dough from machine and divide into two equal portions.
5. Place each portion in a small loaf pan and cover.
6. Let the dough rise for 45 minutes to 1 hour until doubled.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 35-40 minutes.
NOTE: This can be mixed on manual of the bread machine.
